Container.Name: Picfoil
Container.Overview:
Picfoil is a Nintendo Switch game library manager and Tinfoil shop server.
Place your keys.txt file in the config directory (/app/config/keys.txt) for title decryption support.
Note: This template assumes a locally built image. Set the Repository field to your local image name (e.g. picfoil:latest) after building with: docker build -t picfoil:latest .

Config.Name: Games Library
Config.Description: Path to your Nintendo Switch games library

Config.Name: Combined Games Output
Config.Description: Output directory for combined XCI files (optional, only needed if XCI combining is enabled in settings)

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Torrent client download directory (optional, only needed if Prowlarr/torrent integration is enabled)

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (99 = nobody on Unraid)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (100 = users on Unraid)

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Admin user name (optional, created/updated at startup)

Config.Name: Guest Username
Config.Description: Guest user name (optional, created/updated at startup)
